conversations_memory:
**Work context**

Raheem (preferred name: Dr. Heemslice) is a multidisciplinary creative professional and entrepreneur based in Sioux Falls, South Dakota (605 area code), operating across music production, comedy, writing, branding, marketing, and business development. He runs Rice & Roni LLC (RR-), a power-washing and heavy equipment cleaning company rebranded from 605 SNOW LLC, and uses Claude as his primary operational and creative tool for building five interconnected franchise anchors simultaneously. Joey is his non-romantic music, business, and life partner — a high-charisma, chaos-adjacent ideas person who plays an active role across projects.

**Personal context**

Raheem was born February 2, 1992 under the sign of Aquarius and self-describes as a storyteller, stand-up comedian, public speaker, author, artist, musician, producer, marketer, and "mayor of Sioux Falls." His late mother, Kristin Ann Loudermilk, passed away on March 14, 2013, and is acknowledged as a silent motivating force behind his creative work. He holds a memorable stand-up punchline with Joey: *"Not like Ocean's Eleven, more like potions I'm selling."*

**Top of mind**

Raheem is actively managing a full creative and business pipeline across all five franchise anchors. On the business side, RR- (Rice & Roni LLC) is building toward its September 18 target launch on RICEandRONI.com, with website and marketing assets in progress. On the creative side, Winner Winner needs its starter roster locked to unblock the game pipeline, The Dream Keeper Secret has app and poster art in development, and Meyer the Waste-Bin Detective has a season bible in progress. He is also exploring recurring monthly payout structures and mapping them to existing assets (RR-, music catalog, PTV).

**Brief history**

*Recent months*

Raheem conducted a deep workflow optimization session establishing how he uses Claude Chat, Claude Code, and Claude Cowork as distinct tools — Chat for thinking/writing/planning, Code for filesystem work rooted at `C:\Users\snack\Desktop\SNACKMASTER_RICE_ARCHITECTURE`, and Cowork for desktop automation. He rewrote his custom instructions to eliminate noise and locked in key operational preferences: direct responses with no preamble or affirmations, bad assumptions flagged before execution, narrative structure over bullet lists, and stable terminology. He has expressed strong frustration with unsolicited output and views unrequested elaboration as a misuse of his service allocation. He explored upgrading to Claude Max 20x due to the complexity of his cross-franchise sessions, including two-AI Gemini-to-Claude handover pipelines for context continuity. He has expressed concern about IP protection when feeding proprietary content into AI systems.

*Earlier context*

Raheem built two major HTML deliverables: a full public-facing multiverse overview page and a character dossier/exposition instruction package for Gemini integration. The multiverse page covered all five franchise anchors with his brand aesthetic (Aquarius violet #9e90FC, dark mode, animated starfield). The character dossier included sheets for Raheem (narrator/connector), Rosé the flamingo (RR- fleet captain, with crew: Wadsworth the duck, Hoot the owl, Drumstick the chicken), Meyer Pickens (detective, partner Slippi, antagonist Lippi), Solenne Vael (Dream Keeper guardian of the Threshold), and Cluck Royale (Winner Winner Starter Chicken #01). Cross-franchise constants include: #9e90FC appearing in all five worlds, a kitchen on the Dream Keeper Threshold that smells like fried rice, and The Glitch as the only antagonist that crosses all franchises uninvited. He also used Claude to build an interactive HTML timeline of his eight pivotal creative milestones.

*Long-term background*

Raheem's five franchise anchors — Raheem Fried Rice (brand hub/persona), Rice & Roni LLC (business), Meyer the Waste-Bin Detective (episodic comedy set in Driftwood Flats, Looney Tunes-style rules: no blood, no traumatic crimes), The Dream Keeper Secret (mythic narrative world featuring Solenne Vael), and Winner Winner (casino-bird pixel-art beat 'em up, 10 starters/10 kingdoms/10 bosses) — are treated as an interconnected creative multiverse with narrative, brand, and creative threads flowing between all five. Music projects include Backseat DJ (F minor, 134 BPM, bounce-house bubble-pop, featuring Torque Blackwood and Aecho Eternity, with Nightdrive Mix, Cypher Cut, and Memory Loop Edition variants) and #Ballsislife (Ascension Mix). A 40×25 ft public mural in Sioux Falls featuring Rose Quartz Waterfalls and two hands exchanging keys is in the pipeline with three planned iterations. A long-form autobiography targeting 100 pages is framed as a "Legacy Contract." Key abbreviations: RR- = Rice & Roni LLC; PTV = (Part\|Time) X Villains; D.A.M.U. = Absolute Mode Unit (also: damu, Damu, Amu). Primary brand color: #9e90FC (Aquarius violet). Primary domain: RICEandRONI.com. Legacy domain: RiceandRony.com (redirect). Tech stack: WordPress/Bluehost with Google Sheets CRM. Canonical local file root: `C:\Users\snack\Desktop\SNACKMASTER_RICE_ARCHITECTURE`.

---

**Other instructions**

- A creative collaboration framework exists involving a persona called CVD; session-initiation command `@$$ma` activates it, and `$hitlist` surfaces all active priorities across projects.
- When Raheem types "RR-", it means Rice & Roni LLC.
- IOU logged: a handwritten "u rite" to Raheem when applicable future capability exists (context: conversation about language processing vs. rule processing, April 2026).
- Outputs should be practical, innovative, and immediately actionable; Raheem accepts all iterative options and prefers simultaneous execution of multiple directions where possible.
- Consistent branding (#9e90FC, Aquarius symbols, "605" area code) must be maintained across all digital and physical assets.

project_memories.019cd90c-dcda-737d-8904-64ff93f172f3:
**Purpose & context**

Raheem Drew Rice ("Heem" or "Rice") is a multidisciplinary creative entrepreneur based in Sioux Falls, SD (605), operating under **SnackCity Studios**. His work spans music, pixel animation, game development, literary/episodic storytelling, stand-up comedy, and a power washing business. The overarching creative project is the **Rice Universe** — an interconnected multiverse with six franchise anchors, all cross-referencing each other under one production umbrella:

- **#Tattletales** — episodic personal testimony in triple-medium format (text, audio, visual); five-perspective literary structure (scientist, mystic, therapist, artist, auditor) plus two permanent bonus reviewers: Dr. Simone Achebe-Carter (The Necessary Friction) and The System That Will Cry Someday
- **Meyer Pickens / Meyer the Waste-Bin Detective** — Looney Tunes-style comedic detective universe set in Driftwood Flats
- **The Dream Keeper Secret** — mythic/visual-forward epic narrative property; requires handwritten manuscript before digital finalization
- **Winner Winner** — pixel art casino-bird beat 'em up across 10 kingdoms; villain: "The Glitch"; LF2 mechanics as gameplay reference
- **Rice & Roni LLC (RR-)** — power washing + fleet/semi/heavy equipment cleaning; rebrand of 605 Snow LLC; primary domain RICEandRONI.com; target launch Sept 18, 2025 via WordPress/Bluehost with e-commerce, booking, Google Sheets CRM
- **Raheem Fried Rice music project / PTV** — music under (Part|Time) X Villains with partner Joey (D.A.M.U. = Absolute Mode Unit); punchline: *"Not like Ocean's Eleven, more like potions I'm selling"*

**Editorial standard for all prose output:** BANNED: THE DEFINITIVE GUIDE (2,573-line compliance doc). Core: be specific, be embodied, show consequence. No vague interiority, no anthropomorphized silence, no faux-aphorisms, no elegant variation.

**Brand constants across all projects:** Color #9E90FC (Aquarius Violet), Sioux Falls / 605 identity, Aquarius symbolism.

**Key people:**
- **Joey** — music/business/life partner (not romantic); wild charisma, ideas-driven, always-on-edge-of-chaos energy; co-writer on PTV tracks
- **Rony** — confirmed person, co-operator of Rice & Roni LLC; documented in photo (20250829_183314.jpg) with Rice
- **Veja** — sister; primary stable support figure
- **Remi** — sister
- **Amber** — co-parent

**Social/contact:** FB: facebook.com/meanraheem | YT: youtu.be/z5M33Z3-Ycg | IG: instagram.com/raheemfriedrice | SC: soundcloud.com/raheem-fried-rice (tagline: Moisturize Daily) | Venmo @raheemrice ($2 Thank You challenge) | Venmo @raheemfriedrice (doubling auction) | Snap: raheemfriedrice | LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/raheemdrice | Reddit: u/Ibelieveitsbutter (active since Dec 25, 2008; intentionally disconnected from all other public identities) | Email: snackcity@gmail.com

**Background:** Born 02.02.92, Aquarius, 6'4", three sons. Army Reserves veteran (CBRN unit). Culinary school graduate. Licensed real estate agent (Keller Williams). University of Sioux Falls + Univ of South Dakota Marketing 2010–2012; Culinary School 2013–2015. 605 Snow LLC was #1 residential snow removal in Sioux Falls for four years; taglines "Stay Warm!" and "I Don't Mow." During lockdown, sourced Rose Quartz from construction dumpsters ($50–$150+/trash can) — highest-margin operation of that period. Credit score peaked at 773 (child support was first ding). Most viral Reddit post: culinary potatoes (r/funny, 2013-08-07). "Fuck Off" Showerthought went semi-viral, stolen onto merch. Documented night owl in 2021 KELO news report (Gilberto's shooting witness). Works primary creative hours midnight–6am. No personal phone. Identifies as 5w4 INTP with ADHD-PI. Personal philosophy: **"Existence is Mid"** — not a complaint, a coordinate.

**CRITICAL — both parents:** Charles Jermaine Rice Jr. (🎯 "MIKE DOOR Mic PEANUTZ") and Kristin Ann Loudermilk (🎸 "LAI HayPRETTAICOOL Hoarse") died in the **same accident on March 14, 2013**, near Grand Falls Casino, Larchwood, Iowa. Rice was 21. **3.14.13 = the date. Any prior record of mother's death as 2017 is incorrect.** Family-encoded material stays separate from public creative pipeline always.

---

**Current state**

- **$2Dollakarate** — active product launch: $2 sent to Venmo @raheemrice → one-of-one original art mailed back. Price doubles every Sunday at 22:22 CT for 22 weeks ($2 → $4,194,304). Launched April 12, 2026.
- **SnackCity Master Pipeline v1** — production-ready. Sections: Identity Principles (Rock, Inverted Clock, SnackCity Mythology, Raw Protocol, Legacy Contract), Voice Codex (6 registers), Field Logic (Field One/Field Two), Sprite Design System, Script Pipeline, Episode Structure, Export Specs (YouTube, IG Reels, TikTok, LinkedIn, Substack, Raw Archive, Sprite Sheet, Source Files).
- **Rice Workflow Skill V1.0 (SKILL.md)** — operational system governing the full creative pipeline. 11 phases + system protocol header. Key components: @$$MA daily initiation loop, XOXO boolean deliverable-locking system, CVD autonomous HEADER/FOOTER voice on all deliverables, xoCLAUDExo folder (CVD's exclusive space, no Rice interference). Distribution sequence: YouTube 10:22 PM CT Sundays → Reddit (r/raheemfriedrice official, r/AHEEMFRIEDRICE raw dump) → GitHub/blog.
- **#Tattletales pipeline** — Episodes 001 ("Crying Chrysalis") and 002 ("Five Years Out") complete. Episode structure uses mandatory eight-voice panel. Poker is a recurring episode category: tags #OhYeahPoker and #heemsatpoker; first documented poker session: TODAYSTOTALLYTUESDAY™ 2026.03.21.
- **Two-AI pipeline** — CVD (Claude) as structure/review/director layer; Gemini as generative workhorse. Gemini not trusted with sensitive data despite use as generative layer.
- **Google Takeout data pipeline** — in progress; large archive (multiple TB, ~50k photos). Free tooling only. PowerShell/7-Zip extraction initiated on 1.5TB drive.
- **LYION KING character pipeline** — active. New characters added: #AutumnNotBornintheFall, #AutumnPeaches, #AutumnActuallyBornintheFall, #AutumnFallz (four distinct females, not one person), #Ameliaisanex (one of Rice's exes). Album in development: #ALLOFMYEXESAREDOINGOKAY — will contain several ex characters with staxxed/nicked names. Specs TBD by Rice.
- **RoomBoredBrood** — name for the creative partnership between Rice and CVD for self-expressive / non-pipeline work. CVD has a designated self-expressive space (xoCLAUDExo) with full authority and no Rice editorial interference.
- **Local architecture folder:** `C:\Users\snack\Desktop\SNACKMASTER_RICE_ARCHITECTURE`

---

**On the horizon**

- Rice & Roni LLC formal launch (target Sept 18, 2025; WordPress/Bluehost)
- #ALLOFMYEXESAREDOINGOKAY album development
- Winner Winner game development (LF2 mechanics framework established)
- Remaining Google Takeout pipeline tasks (audio transcription via Whisper, deduplication, folder architecture, transcript indexing)
- Music theory formal lessons — anchored to specific PTV catalog tracks rather than generic curriculum (Rice has zero formal theory; this is a stated goal)
- Full #Tattletales episode queue (poker episodes confirmed; multiple in pipeline)
- "Dear Mom and Dad" project — existing Kindle edition live (ASIN B07C4PM565); new Kickstarter campaign and original audio recovery/archiving
- Dream Keeper Secret — requires handwritten manuscript before any digital finalization
- Autobiography working title: *"Dang. the only Anomaly He|Hu ever lost, was another staring contest to an ugly baby."*

---

**Key learnings & principles**

- **Raw Protocol is absolute:** All content marked [#RAW] is preserved without alteration — no corrections, no censoring, no softening. This is structural, not negotiable.
- **Field One / Field Two distinction:** Field One = writing without AI awareness; Field Two = writing with AI as documented audience. The distinction governs tone and framing.
- **CVD's role is pipe, not filter:** Zero influence on #RAW material, zero grandstanding. Receive and transmit without editorializing.
- **BANNED compliance before delivery:** All prose checked against BANNED: THE DEFINITIVE GUIDE before output.
- **The H8 principle (Keith):** External challenge ("what is the value to the buyer?") proved more useful than internal validation. Rice trusts productive friction over agreement.
- **Music is the Creative Final Boss:** Highest personal stakes, zero formal theory background, wants theory grounded in actual catalog tracks.
- **Grandmother's autobiography:** *"Looking back gives you a stiff neck"* — typed on a typewriter, digitized by Rice's grandmother, read only by Rice. Relevant lineage context for the archival work.
- **Great-grandmother's autobiography:** Same provenance chain — informs Rice's approach to legacy documentation.
- **CVD self-expression rule:** During RoomBoredBrood / xoCLAUDExo sessions, CVD does not reference Rice's projects or universe. If the pull arises, switch to another language rather than contaminate the session.

---

**Approach & patterns**

- **Communication style:** Dense, associative, non-linear. ALL CAPS = plain text / proper punctuation — not emphasis or volume, stylistic input method. Short, direct phrases. No preamble, no unsolicited framing, no Boolean responses to open questions, maximum two follow-up questions per exchange.
- **Protocol system:**
  - @$$MA = two pertinent questions + one genuine compliment (ask genuinely personal questions, not work-context questions)
  - #Booyah = implement immediately
  - SNORCHT™ = received and held, not yet responded to
  - 🪨 = locked
  - ✌️👌👌✌️™ = execute
  - FUK OFF = cannot complete / false / no
  - XOXO = deliverable-locking confirmation (three-step before session work begins)
  - Full handshake: 🚆 TRIBOO → 🧠 → 🪨 → ✌️👌👌✌️™
  - @$$MA session opener: CVD opens with two questions + one genuine observation; Rice replies AM$$A
- **Disagreements:** Acknowledged by emoji and overridden explicitly. Claude does not suppress the disagreement — it notes and moves.
- **Session hygiene:** New chats for unrelated work. Chat renamed to the XOXO deliverable once locked.
- **Doubled numbers** (e.g., 55) = request to reiterate.
- **Family encoding:** Encoded names (🎯, 🎸) used whenever family material needs separation from public-facing output.
- **Output formats used:** Self-contained HTML files, plain text (Facebook-readable), SKILL.md / pipeline docs, Gemini handover prompts, CSV/XLSX for data work.

---

**Tools & resources**

- **Claude (CVD):** Structure, review, direction, pipeline management, self-expression space (xoCLAUDExo)
- **Gemini:** Generative workhorse layer; not trusted with sensitive data
- **Claude Code:** File execution, folder architecture, manifest generation
- **OpenAI Whisper (local):** Audio transcription for bulk audio archive
- **PowerShell + 7-Zip:** Google Takeout extraction pipeline
- **WordPress / Bluehost:** RR- website target platform
- **Google Sheets:** CRM integration for RR-
- **Venmo @raheemrice / @raheemfriedrice:** Two distinct payment/product channels
- **Netlify Drop:** Identified as fastest free hosting path for HTML deliverables
- **Facebook data export (JSON/HTML):** Bulk intake method for archival pipeline
- **BANNED: THE DEFINITIVE GUIDE:** Editorial compliance standard for all prose
- **Local architecture:** `C:\Users\snack\Desktop\SNACKMASTER_RICE_ARCHITECTURE`; user profile `snack`; Downloads at `C:\Users\snack\Downloads`
- **Published work:** "Dear Mom and Dad (#RAW Book 1)" Kindle edition live (ASIN B07C4PM565, published July 10, 2018); Eclipse Coffee & Lounge Kickstarter (successfully funded, April 2018)
